creator: chess@chessgriffin.com
text:
On Thu, 21 Feb 2008 04:27:01 +0100 (CET)
Björn König <bkoenig@alpha-tierchen.de> wrote:

> Chess Griffin wrote:
> 
> > [...] this port seems to install just the
> > serif fonts.  I've used Libertine on Linux systems and there is a
> > sans serif as well (and a monospace, IIRC).  The website displays
> > the sans serif fonts.  It would be nice to have the rest of the
> > fonts too.
> 
> The port installs all ttf and otf files that are packaged in
> LinLibertineFont-2.7.tgz. I haven't found sans serif or monospace
> fonts. The "styles" section of the website [1] lists serif fonts only
> (except a grotesque).
> 
> Regards
> Björn
> 
> [1] http://linuxlibertine.sourceforge.net/Libertine-EN.html
> 
> 

Bjorn,

My apologies.  I was thinking about the Liberation fonts.  You are
quite right about Libertine.  

Anyway, the ports builds, installs, and works great.  Thanks!

-- 
Chess Griffin
GPG Public Key:  0x0C7558C3
http://www.chessgriffin.com
